Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Аркана Помірності[n]може зараз допомогти мені поглибити наші стосунки...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7001 0 0}I just rented a DVD. It's a foreign film about a hardboiled detective.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have a little free time right now, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1113_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, I rented a DVD. It's a foreign film about a hardboiled detective.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've got a lot of free time on days we don't go to Tartarus, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching a detective movie with Amada[n]might help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you're free right now, do you want to watch it with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7001 0 0}Do you want to watch more of the film series we started together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I just rented another movie from the same series because I wanted to watch it sometime...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching a detective movie with Amada[n]might help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}The reviews online all seemed pretty positive, so I'm sure it's worth watching.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7064 0 0}I rented the final movie from that series.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm certain it'll be a good watch, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1113_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}Junpei-san and Chidori-san's relationship kinda feels like a movie plot, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, by the way... I rented the final movie from that series.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm certain it'll be a good watch, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like Amada is looking[n]forward to hanging out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching a detective movie with Amada[n]might help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you want to watch the movie with me, {f 4 1}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7062 0 0}It looks like the director of the movies we watched has a huge repertoire...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1113_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7062 0 0}I learned that the director of the movies we watched actually has a huge repertoire.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}So I rented a bunch of his other works.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}I don't want to bother you, but... I was kind of hoping we could give Junpei-san some good recommendations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Amada will gain any more[n]new skills even if I watch a DVD with him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But watching a detective movie with him[n]might help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you're not busy, do you want to watch the movie together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7068 0 0}Oh, I guess you do seem pretty busy... Maybe the next time you're free then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Amada will gain any more[n]new skills even if I watch a DVD with him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But watching a detective movie with him[n]might help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching a detective film with Amada[n]might help me gain more {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, if you're okay with it, maybe we can watch the movie together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7001 0 0}I know this is kinda coming out of nowhere, but... Um, would you like some coffee right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Not the instant stuff, but with properly ground beans and all that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw someone prepare coffee on a show, and I wanted to try doing it myself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada asked me to join him for coffee...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 1}-san, if you don't mind, could you maybe be my taste-tester?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7062 0 0}I studied up a little on coffee beans.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wanted to test some things out. Do you have some free time right now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada asked me to join him for coffee...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I promise I'll brew it correctly this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7002 0 0}I was thinking about brewing some coffee right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wanted to show you that I can do it properly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada seems serious.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}He might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, do you have some time right now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7068 0 0}Oh, I was thinking about brewing some coffee. Would you like some?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Amada will gain any more[n]new skills even if I have coffee with him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's like I'm a barista or something. This is pretty fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}You can take your coffee to go if you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7088 0 0}Okay! I'll get started right away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Amada will gain any more[n]new skills even if I have coffee with him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'd be happy if you could join me.[n]{f 1 1}
